meanings.definition: to render motionless, as with a fixed stare or by arousing terror or awe
examples: The snake charmer fascinates the cobra

meanings.definition: attract strongly, as if with a magnet
examples: She magnetized the audience with her tricks

meanings.definition: attracting and holding interest as if by a spell
examples: read the bedtime story in a hypnotic voice
she had a warm mesmeric charm
the sheer force of his presence was mesmerizing
a spellbinding description of life in ancient Rome
